testcase.name: test_get_image_has_cache_control_header

failure.message: AssertionError: Cache-Control should contain max-age, got: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate assert 'max-age' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_photo_features.py:167: in test_get_image_has_cache_control_header assert "max-age" in cache_control, f"Cache-Control should contain max-age, got: {cache_control}" E AssertionError: Cache-Control should contain max-age, got: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate E assert 'max-age' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate'
